response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and noted two distinct performances based on on-screen title cards and changes in choreography/performers. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie' (artist AKB48) and Song 2 as 'Hatsukoi Daisensou' (artist Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, Yukihana Lamy). 3. Performed searches: 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie AKB48 Japanese and English lyrics' and 'Hatsukoi Daisensou Yuzuki Choco Japanese and English lyrics'. 4. Extracted sample lyrics and structured the JSON.
response.global_summary: A concert video featuring VTubers Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy performing two songs: 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie' by AKB48 and 'Hatsukoi Daisensou' by Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy, as part of the Shimotsuki Choko Birthday Festival 2026.

scenes.description: VTubers Yuzuki Choko and Shirogane Noel dance and sing 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie'. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あなたのことが好きなのに
私にまるで興味ない
何度も繰り返す失恋の準備
Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I love you, and yet
You have no interest in me at all
Preparing for yet another heartbreak
Yeah! Yeah! Yeah!

scenes.description: VTubers Yuzuki Choko, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy perform 'Hatsukoi Daisensou'. The song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.original_artist: Yuzuki Choco, Shirogane Noel, Yukihana Lamy
scenes.performer_in_video: Yuzuki Choko, Shirogane Noel, and Yukihana Lamy
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
本命上げちゃうメルティ
誰にも渡さない大戦争
おっと決めちゃいますベルティ
それじゃ手と手繋がない♪内緒でトク
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'll raise the stakes, a love war
I won't let anyone have you
It's a big love war, I've decided
It's a secret, okay?
